response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role is a director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. The resume shows no recognized AI expertise, no AI/ML products or platforms built, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of director-level technical leadership or advising strategic customers. Recent AI exposure is limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow support, which is far below the bar for a Principal AI strategy IC.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded and infrastructure
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Active community contributor with talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Lacks director-level leadership scope and strategic advisory experience
Roughly 14–16 years experience but title trajectory stops at Senior/Staff, not Principal

key_factors.factor: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. director-level Principal IC scope
